headline: Headline rev disaster, but the market rewarded the narrative — +21.7% on the day. 2 hyperscaler MSAs signed; first order Q3.
realStoryHeadlines: 2 hyperscaler MSAs signed — competitive RFP wins, not relationship favors. First order this quarter.
Order intake doubled YoY to $2B with ~50% from first-time customers — real third-party diversification
$80M Q2 revenue deferred to Q3 from port delays — normalized rev would have been ~$545M
2H FY26 = 70% of annual guide — execution risk concentrated in next two quarters
Cash burned hard: $714M→$413M in 6mo on inventory build for 2H ramp. Liquidity still $900M+.
OBBBA + PFE restrictions effectively price Chinese competition out of US base ITC — structural moat

frameworkOverride.rationale: Screener TTM growth of +1.2% reads stale post-FY24 lap. FY26 guide of $3.2-3.6B vs FY25 $2.26B = +41% to +59% YoY = textbook stage crossover.

tradingRead.earningsRule: Print was 5 days ago — structures across this print correctly capped LOW conf. Next print (~early August) is next binary.
tradingRead.postPrintIV: IV crushed off the print. CSPs at $15-17 reasonable tactically if you believe Q3 hyperscaler narrative holds.
tradingRead.longThesisGate: Stock already +21.7% on print. Risk-reward worsened. Need Q3 confirmation of $80M deferred + hyperscaler ramp + intake conversion.
tradingRead.bottomLine: Cleanest expression of the BESS-as-AI-infra thesis vs CLSK's empty tease. Wait for pullback or Q3 confirmation; don't chase post-print high.
